title: moist gooey British almonds Robata-Grill Pastry
description: Delicately balance the tartness of the pastry with the crunch of the almonds, finishing with a robust Robata-Grill crust. A show-off British dessert to impress your guests with a gooey centre.

ingredients.name: Almond flour
ingredients.notes: fine grind to ensure a smooth texture

ingredients.name: Granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: white caster sugar for a balanced sweetness

ingredients.name: Single cream
ingredients.notes: to enhance the moist and creamy filling

ingredients.name: Breadcrumbs (gluten-free)
ingredients.notes: for added texture and prevent pastry from shrinking

instructions: Preheat the Robata-grill to 500°F (260°C) for a quick and even heat.
In a large bowl, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy, then set aside.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, almond flour, lemon zest and breadcrumbs until smooth and well combined.
Gradually add the cream to the egg mixture, stirring continuously to prevent lumps.
Add the sugar mixture to the egg mixture and stir until well combined.
Wrap the pastry in cling film and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the ingredients to meld.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3mm).
Transfer the pastry to the preheated Robata-grill and cook for 15-20 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove from the grill and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
To serve, slice the pastry into wedges and spoon the gooey centre onto a plate.
Garnish with additional almonds and a drizzle of single cream, if desired.
Serve immediately, allowing the centre to ooze out as you eat it.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days, reheating in the microwave or oven before serving.
